title: Wario Land: Super Mario Land 3
platform_style_description: Game Boy aesthetic, green monochrome palette, crisp pixel forms, portable mood, and very clean value separation
main_subject: a stout treasure hunter in side view carrying a sack
environment: a compact ruin or cliffside path with coins, bricks, and a visible drop below
action_mood_cue: planting their feet before pushing deeper toward treasure
composition: single stout explorer only, side-view platform read, one treasure cue, chunky foreground shapes
memory_hook: weighty movement, treasure pursuit, and compact portable platforming
legal_watchouts: avoid official hat and mustache codes
legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A stout treasure hunter in side view carrying a sack in a compact ruin or cliffside path with coins, bricks, and a visible drop below, planting their feet before pushing deeper toward treasure.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Game Boy aesthetic, green monochrome palette, crisp pixel forms, portable mood, and very clean value separation
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- greedy, heavy, playful

Composition:
- single stout explorer only, side-view platform read, one treasure cue, chunky foreground shapes
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Wario likeness, avoid official hat and mustache codes, avoid exact coin iconography, avoid resemblance to mario

generation_notes.preferred_render_mode: illustrative pixel art or stylized retro render
generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
